ab: niya mki syaw Lyung Penux sali myan.
en: Our family lives by the Da’an River.
There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: mgluw sami myanux ki yaba yaya bsuyan tmalung ru bsuyan knerin.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: bawi balay yaba mu yaba mu ga kinsat.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: mhikang balay yaya mu yaya mu ga kuysang.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: mki sali mutu sami kyalun kay tayan ni yaba.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Atayal language with us at home.

ab: mhngi ’bagan ga mutu sami musa alang.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: bsuyan mu tmalung ru knerin ki kuzing mgluw sami kmyap takay.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: sgalan mu balay utux sali myan.
en: I like our family very much.
